plugins.prepareCmd: npm --no-git-tag-version --prefix client version ${nextRelease.version} && sed -i "s/^version = .*/version = '${nextRelease.version}'/" core/build.gradle && sed -i "s/^appVersion: .*/appVersion: \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" deploy/helm/kontor/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^version = .*/version = \"${nextRelease.version}\"/" ai/pyproject.toml
